title: MonoMacs- From PBMCs to adherent macrophages in culture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"entvo","text":"Starting from human blood, this protocol outlines how to isolating PBMCs (peripheral blood mononuclear cells), freeze them down, thaw them, modify them into adherent macrophages, and finally harvest the macrophages to initiate experiments","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: DPBS, calcium, magnesium Thermo Fisher Catalog #14040117 Fetal bovine serum (FBS) BioWest Catalog #S181B-500 Heparin Sodium Injection, USP Fresenius Kabi Catalog #168718 Gibco™ RPMI 1640 Medium Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11875135 Penicillin-Streptomycin (10,000 U/mL) Thermo Fisher Catalog #15140163 Sodium Pyruvate Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11360070 GlutaMAX™ Supplement Thermo Fisher Catalog #35050079 HEPES (1M) Thermo Fisher Catalog #15630130 MEM Non-essential Amino Acid Solution (100) MilliporeSigma Catalog #M7145 2-Mercaptoethanol Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1610710 IMDM Thermo Scientific Catalog #12440046 Dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D2438 (CAS: 67-68-5) Recombinant Human M-CSF (carrier-free) BioLegend Catalog #574802 %s %s %s %s %s %s Human Monocyte Macs media: Gibco™ RPMI 1640 Medium Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11875135 = 44.4ml GlutaMAX™ Supplement Thermo Fisher Catalog #35050079 = 500ul Recombinant Human M-CSF (carrier-free) BioLegend Catalog #574802 50 ng/ml M-CSF = 50ul Fetal bovine serum (FBS) BioWest Catalog #S181B-500 FBS = 5 ml R10 media Gibco™ RPMI 1640 Medium Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11875135 plus 10% Fetal bovine serum (FBS) BioWest Catalog #S181B-500

Polypropylene Centrifuge Tubes, 50mL Conical bottom tube; Max RCF: 15500xG; High-density polyethylene cap; No rack Thermo Fisher Catalog #0553868 General Use and PrecisionGlide Hypodermic Needles, 18 G x 1.5 in. (38mm); Regular bevel; Pink Thermo Fisher Catalog #148265D 10 mL BD Luer-Lok Syringe Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #302995 DPBS, calcium, magnesium Thermo Fisher Catalog #14040117 Ficoll®-Paque Premium MilliporeSigma Catalog #GE17-5442-02 ACK Lysing Buffer Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #A1049201 %s %s
Spin down 25 mL ( 12.5 mL PBMC suspension in two 15 mL conicals ) at 1300 rpm, 20 °C, 4 minutes (4min) Resuspend each pellet in 10 mL
Transfer 10 mL of monocyte suspension into each of two suspension culture flask T75 Genesee Scientific Catalog #25-214

Incubate cultures in a 37 °C cell culture incubator Heracell™ 240i CO2 Incubator, 240L (CO2 Incubator, Thermo Scientific™, 51032875, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/51032875 ) with 5% CO2 / 95% air for 48 hr.

Rinse the cultures 3 times with 10 mL Gibco™ RPMI 1640 Medium Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11875135 (pre-warmed to 37 °C), gently removing the culture medium to avoid dislodging any loosely attached cells.
Following rinsing, add fresh Human Monocyte Macs media , changing media every 48:00:00 until monocytes differentiate and proliferate sufficiently to become confluent.
Warm PBMC Thawing Media to 37 °C in a water bath before beginning the thawing procedure.
Remove the vial(s) from liquid nitrogen (LN2 Box C09) and wipe off the outside of the vial, and spray with 70% ethanol.
Place the vial(s) in cell culture incubator at 37 °C for 00:10:00, at least 10 min
Remove from incubator, spray with 70% ethanol, and wipe off the outside of the vial.
Transfer the clean, dry vial to the biosafety hood.

Gently pipette warmed PBMCs into tube with warmed PBMC Thawing Media . The final volume should be ≥ twice the volume of the cell suspension. 2 mL, depending on volume of cells, usually 1 ml cells in cryovial
330 rcf, 20 °C, 10 minutes, 10 min
Pour off supernatant.
Gently flick the tube to break up pellet. DO NOT pipet up and down or vortex!!
Repeat wash.
330 rcf, 20 °C, 10 minutes, 10 min
Pour off supernatant.
Re-suspend cells in warm PBMC Thawing Media

Determine the cell number and viability with Trypan Blue Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #T10282 Countess II FL (Cell Counter, Invitrogen, AMQAF1000, https://www.thermofisher.com/us/en/home/life-science/cell-analysis/cell-analysis-instruments/automated-cell-counters/countess-ii-fl-automated-cell-counter.html )

Rinse differentiated macrophages in flask with 10 mL pre-warmed 37 °C DPBS, calcium, magnesium Thermo Fisher Catalog #14040117 Dulbecco’s phosphate-buffered saline without Ca2+ and Mg2+ (DPBS) before adding 3 mL pre-warmed 37 °C Trypsin-EDTA (0.25%), phenol red Thermo Fisher Catalog #25200114

Place flask in cell culture incubator for 00:10:00, (5-10 min) at which time approximately 90% of the macrophages should have rounded and detached. Verify this by microscopic examination of the flask.
Add 5 mL of Gibco™ RPMI 1640 Medium Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11875135 containing 10% Fetal bovine serum (FBS) BioWest Catalog #S181B-500 to stop trypsinization.

Transfer the macrophage cell suspension from the flask into a Polypropylene Centrifuge Tubes, 50mL Conical bottom tube; Max RCF: 15500xG; High-density polyethylene cap; No rack Thermo Fisher Catalog #0553868 300 x g, 20 °C, 5 minutes, (5 min) , and discard the supernatant.
Gently resuspend the macrophages into 5 mL of Human Monocyte Macs media

Mix 10 µL of macrophage cell suspension with 10 µL Trypan Blue Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #T10282 solution and determine macrophage cell number and viability (typically > 95%) using Countess II FL (Cell Counter, Invitrogen, AMQAF1000, https://www.thermofisher.com/us/en/home/life-science/cell-analysis/cell-analysis-instruments/automated-cell-counters/countess-ii-fl-automated-cell-counter.html )
Based on the cell count, add additional Human Monocyte Macs media to achieve the desired seeding cell density.
creator: Amy Sansone
